title: National Coordination of Data Steward Education in Denmark: next steps
author: Lorna Wildgaard
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Presentation to the    DINI/nestor-Workshop: "Data Stewardship im Forschungsdatenmanagement - Was ist das? Rollen, Aufgabenprofile, Einsatzgebiete". The presentation is in English and covers a brief introduction to the Danish project on Data Steward Education, the thoughts behind a new 1 yr master in Data Stewardship and links to other initiatives on the professionalisation of Data Stewardship.
